title: [Bug]: The query returned results using an expression with a value of false in the WHERE clause.
description: <!-- A clear and concise description of bug. -->
poc: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t0(c0 BIT);

SELECT ALL t0.c0, t1.c0 FROM t0, t1
WHERE (NOT ((t1.c0) AND ((+ ((t0.c0) < (-2103084388))))));
key_bug_features: Query returns results with false WHERE clause expression
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 DATE DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO t2(c1, c2) VALUES(1, 'test'), (0, 'example'), (NULL, 'NULL value');
SELECT c1, c2 FROM t2 WHERE (c1 = 0 AND c3 IS NULL) OR (c2 = 'test' AND c1 < 5);
SELECT c1, c2 FROM t2 WHERE (NOT (c1 > 0) OR (c3 IS NOT NULL));
